A problem you know well

The Minor Prophets: the part of the Bible nobody taught you to understand

You open Habakkuk, Nahum, or Zephaniah and have no idea who they were, who they spoke to, or what it has to do with your life today.

  • You sense there's something powerful in these books, but can't unlock it on your own
  • You want to study the Bible more deeply, but the minor prophets always get pushed to later
  • You lead a small group or Bible study and aren't sure how to teach these books

Full content

12 Prophets. 12 Chapters.
One complete journey.

Each prophet gets its own dedicated chapter, with everything you need to study that book in depth.

01

Hosea

God's faithful love for an unfaithful people

02

Joel

The Holy Spirit and the Day of the Lord

03

Amos

Faith and justice are inseparable

04

Obadiah

The danger of pride and betrayal

05

Jonah

God's mercy without borders

06

Micah

Justice, mercy, and humility

07

Nahum

No oppressor escapes divine judgment

08

Habakkuk

The righteous will live by faith

09

Zephaniah

God sings with love over His people

10

Haggai

The question of spiritual priorities

11

Zechariah

The Messiah revealed in prophetic visions

12

Malachi

The last prophet points to Jesus

Your questions, answered

Before you decide, read this.

"I don't have a theology background. Will I be able to understand it?"

This material was written exactly for you. Accessible language, historical context explained from scratch. No prior knowledge required.

"I've tried studying the prophets before and gave up."

That's because no one explained the context before handing you the text. Here you'll understand where, when, and to whom each prophet spoke before you read a single line.

"I don't have much time to study."

Each chapter takes 15 to 20 minutes to read. One prophet a week, at your own pace, with guaranteed results.

"Is $6.99 too cheap for a quality study?"

That's exactly the point: a complete, affordable study, no subscription, no platform, no hassle. Pay once and it's yours forever.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2025

1. Who we are

This site belongs to The 12 Prophets Map. We take the privacy of our visitors and customers seriously.

2. Data we collect

  • Name and email provided at checkout
  • Payment data processed by Kiwify
  • Anonymous browsing data via the Meta Pixel

3. How we use your data

  • To deliver the product to your email
  • For product-related communications
  • For ad optimization

4. Meta Pixel

We use the Meta Pixel to measure ad performance. This data is used only for optimization and is never sold. Manage your preferences at facebook.com/ads/preferences.

5. Your rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your data (e.g. under GDPR or Brazil's LGPD). Contact us at: contato@menoresprofetas.com.br

Terms of Use

Last updated: June 2025

1. About the product

The 12 Prophets Map is a digital PDF product delivered after payment is confirmed. The content is for personal use and may not be redistributed or resold.

2. Delivery

The PDF will be sent to the email address you provide at checkout. Check your spam folder if you don't receive it within 10 minutes.

3. Guarantee and refunds

Unconditional 7-day guarantee. Request a refund by email and we'll return 100% of your payment, no questions asked.

4. Permitted use

Personal use and private study groups. Reproducing, copying, or selling this content without authorization is prohibited.
